description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a long, slender barrel and a wooden stock and handguard, giving it a traditional appearance. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark metal, with visible mechanical details such as the bolt and magazine well. The wooden stock is robust and ergonomically shaped, providing a comfortable shoulder rest, while the handguard and grip are also made of wood, offering a secure hold. The rifle is equipped with iron sights, including a front post and a rear notch, for precise aiming. A detachable box magazine is fitted beneath the receiver, and the muzzle end appears to have a simple, unadorned finish. The overall build suggests durability and reliability, suitable for use in various urban environments.
description: A traditional rifle with a long metal barrel, wooden stock, and iron sights, featuring a detachable box magazine and classic design elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, handguard, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Barrel-end view highlighting the circular muzzle and slim profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, trigger, and wooden components in detail.
description_view_3: Stock-end view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
